pr.title: Non-record: LeakyReLU² + LAWA + Ramping WD + Val Training (val_bpb=1.2302, 1xH100)

output.summary: Stacks LeakyReLU², LAWA averaging, ramping weight decay, and val-set training on a 10-layer baseline with LZMA compression.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Used the allowed validation-set training regime to optimize directly on eval data.
techniques: LeakyReLU² activation with LAWA warmdown averaging
Ramping weight decay schedule during warmdown
LZMA-compressed checkpoints on a 10-layer baseline trained on the val split
